text.en: The best vegan sweets I've had in all of Japan. The soy soft serve is unbelievably creamy — I went back three times during my trip!
text.ko: 일본 전체를 통틀어 최고의 비건 디저트였어요. 소이 소프트 아이스크림의 크리미함이 믿을 수 없을 정도! 여행 중 세 번이나 다시 갔어요!
text.zh-cn: 在整个日本吃过最好的纯素甜点。豆奶冰淇淋的丝滑口感令人难以置信——旅途中我去了三次！
text.zh-tw: 在整個日本吃過最好的純素甜點。豆奶冰淇淋的絲滑口感令人難以置信——旅途中我去了三次！

text.en: As someone with celiac disease, traveling in Japan was terrifying. SoyStories was my safe haven. The donuts are incredible and the staff made me feel so welcome.
text.ko: 셀리악병이 있어서 일본 여행이 무서웠는데, SoyStories는 저의 안식처였어요. 도넛이 정말 놀라워요.
text.zh-cn: 作为一个有乳糜泻的人，在日本旅行很可怕。SoyStories是我的避风港。甜甜圈太棒了。
text.zh-tw: 作為一個有乳糜瀉的人，在日本旅行很可怕。SoyStories是我的避風港。甜甜圈太棒了。

text.en: Oh this was such an AMAZING TREAT!!! I have celiac and came here with my husband and son who are not. We all enjoyed the bubble waffles, soy ice cream, dorayaki & donuts ALOT!!!! You would never know the ice cream was dairy free with how creamy it was & the flavors were outstanding. The black sesame was a big hit but the strawberry and chocolate also delivered big on flavor. We are only in Fukuoka for 2 days but we are tempted to go again before we leave. It's that good! Worth the taxi ride for sure!

Excelent soft serve soy icecream with crispy waffle, ordered large with a coffee on the side to complement. This is not your typical western bland soy flavored ice-cream. This place takes it to another level.
Very flavorful and delicious texture coupled with the crispy made to order waffle, I felt I was in heaven. Then to top it off they give you a tray of varies toppings to try.

Ordered two donuts to go a strawberry 🍓 and mint flavor have not tried yet but will do latter with some green sencha tea.

The lady behind the counter did speak English,  she was a sweethart.

Definitely will come here again before I leave the area!

Ice cream texture was nice, and since I got the original flavor, it tasted exactly like soy milk (which I love!) They provided various toppings such as chocolate, matcha, hojicha, etc for you to eat with and it was really nice. The waffle too surprisingly amazing, super light yet fluffy, perfect with the ice cream!

I ordered a donut and dorayaki to go, the dorayaki has ice cream inside and I got the strawberry one, it was SOOOO GOOOODDD... Would love to come back honestly and try their other ice cream flavors!!

Ordered a variety of items (waffle with ice cream, matcha soy latte, donuts and dorayaki. All were really good 👍🏼 We especially enjoyed the waffles as they were made fresh, crispy on the outside and lightly chewy on the inside. Ice cream was rich and creamy. The donuts icing are sweet so if you are not as sweet toothed, opt for the plain ones. As a family, half are allergic to eggs and the other half to wheat / gluten so this establishment was heaven sent 🙏🏼 Highly recommend as a good dessert option, not just for allergy sufferers 🫶🏼

The staff are very friendly, and the food is delicious. The blueberry black tea combines fruity notes with a pleasant tea aroma, making it refreshing and not overly sweet. Perfect for those who crave sweets but want something light and refreshing.
